items.title: Vice President JD Vance named commencement speaker for U.S. Air Force Academy Class of 2026 graduation
items.description: The Academy announced that Vice President Vance will address the Class of 2026 graduation ceremony on May 28, 2026, at Falcon Stadium. More than 900 cadets will commission as officers in the Air Force and Space Force.

items.title: Hosmer Visitor Center Grand Opening Showcases Cadet Experiences
items.description: Over 1,600 people attended the May 16 grand opening of the Hosmer Visitor Center, featuring interactive galleries demonstrating the 47-month cadet journey. The facility showcases Academy heritage and cadet life.

items.title: Academy opens Hosmer Visitor Center with ribbon-cutting ceremony
items.description: The Academy celebrated the Hosmer Visitor Center opening with a ribbon-cutting ceremony on May 15, 2026. The 34,000-square-foot facility honors retired Lt. Gen. Bradley Hosmer and serves as a gateway to understanding the Academy's mission.

items.title: FalconSAT program builds cadet skills through space projects
items.description: Cadets in the FalconSAT program gained hands-on experience developing satellite components including reaction wheels and star trackers. The nearly 20-year program provides practical training in problem-solving and team leadership.
